purpose: Provide AI agents and developers with authoritative business rules and visibility constraints for ASMO Procurement Dashboard reading from SAP S/4HANA

businessContext.operatingModel: ASMO executes procurement on behalf of ARAMCO under controlled governance
businessContext.corePrinciple: Status shown to users must reflect true business authority, not technical completion

antiGoals: Do not expose SAP technical details
Do not expose ARAMCO internal finance data
Do not assume approvals are final unless explicitly confirmed

PR_to_PO.businessMeaning: ASMO processes PRs and POs but ARAMCO approvals define final authority
keyRules: Customer approval may still be pending even if ASMO approved
PR rejection requires mandatory business comment

sourcing.businessMeaning: ASMO runs sourcing while enforcing ARAMCO governance
keyRules: Bidder list may require customer approval
Technical evaluators must not see prices
Multiple awards must create multiple POs
Award approval may occur in BTP

purchaseAgreements.businessMeaning: ASMO manages PA lifecycle, ARAMCO is legal consumer
keyRules: PA must not auto-activate without approvals
PA amendments must not add account assignments
Blocked suppliers may prevent PA creation

rules: Government suppliers do not require VAT
CR and GOSI validation is mandatory
Duplicate CR must not block valid updates
Inspectable and non-inspectable materials follow different logic
Returned qualification must not remap unnecessarily
